# dashboard — ARCHITECTURE.md
# Last Updated: 2026-06-02
# Status: CURRENT SOURCE OF TRUTH — generated by ARCHITECT 2026-06-02

## Feature Overview

The dashboard feature is the owner-only VPORT management surface in VCSM. It is organized as a card system where each card is a vertically-isolated module with its own controller, DAL, hooks, model, screen, and component layers. Access to every dashboard route requires ownership verification via `assertActorOwnsVportActorController` through the booking adapter. The feature also contains two major sub-systems: `flyerBuilder` (flyer design and print) and `qrcode` (QR generation and display). Additionally, there is a public booking surface (`vportPublicBooking.controller.js`) within the bookings card that allows unauthenticated or authenticated citizens to book appointments.

**Source Path:** apps/VCSM/src/features/dashboard/
**Engine Path:** None — feature-only (cross-feature deps via adapters only)

---

## Layer Presence

| Layer | Present | Path |
|---|---|---|
| Controllers | YES | vport/controller/, vport/dashboard/cards/*/controller/, flyerBuilder/controller/, flyerBuilder/designStudio/controller/ |
| DALs | YES | vport/dal/read/, vport/dal/write/, vport/dashboard/cards/*/dal/, flyerBuilder/dal/, flyerBuilder/designStudio/dal/ |
| Models | YES | vport/model/, vport/screens/model/, vport/dashboard/cards/*/model/, flyerBuilder/model/, flyerBuilder/designStudio/model/ |
| Hooks | YES | vport/hooks/, vport/dashboard/cards/*/hooks/, flyerBuilder/hooks/, flyerBuilder/designStudio/hooks/ |
| Screens | YES | vport/screens/, vport/dashboard/cards/*/screens/ (or root card jsx), flyerBuilder/screens/, flyerBuilder/designStudio/screens/ |
| Components | YES | vport/components/, vport/dashboard/cards/*/components/, flyerBuilder/components/, flyerBuilder/designStudio/components/, qrcode/components/, dashboard/shared/components/ |
| Adapters | YES | vport/adapters/vport.adapter.js, qrcode/adapters/qrcode.adapter.js |
| Engine controllers | NO | None |
| Engine DALs | NO | None |

## Active Controllers (26 total)

| Controller | Purpose | Auth Gate |

| checkVportOwnership.controller.js | UI visibility gate — checks if caller owns target VPORT | assertActorOwnsVportActorController (booking adapter) |

| createOwnerBooking.controller.js | Owner creates confirmed booking for a resource | assertActorOwnsVportActorController |

| updateStationFuelUnit.controller.js | Update fuel unit setting for station | assertActorOwnsVportActorController |

| vportTeamAccess.controller.js | Team access check | assertActorOwnsVportActorController |
| vportTeamInvite.controller.js | Accept/decline team invites, barber join flow | assertActorOwnsVportActorController (ELEK-002 dual-path hardened) |
| flyerEditor.controller.js | Upload flyer image + save flyer public details | requireOwnerActorAccess (actor_owners DB) |

## Engine Dependencies

None. The dashboard feature contains no imports from `engines/`. All cross-feature access is routed through adapter boundaries within `apps/VCSM/src/features/`.

---

## Cross-Feature Dependencies

| Feature | What is Imported | Direction | Boundary Respected |
|---|---|---|---|
| booking | assertActorOwnsVportActorController, getActorByIdDAL, useOwnerBookingResources, useBookingHistory | dashboard → booking | YES — booking.adapter.js |
| notifications | publishVcsmNotificationBatch, publishVcsmNotification | dashboard → notifications | YES — notifications.adapter.js |
| media (@media alias) | uploadMediaController, useMediaUpload | dashboard → media | YES — @media alias (adapter) |
| media (feature path) | createMediaAssetController, resolveVcsmAppId | dashboard → media | YES — media.adapter.js, mediaAppId.adapter.js |
| profiles | useVportDashboardDetails, useProfilesOps, VportRatesView, VportRateEditorCard, useUpsertVportRate, usePublishExchangeRatePost, mapVportRateRow, usePublishBarbershopHoursPost, usePublishLocksmithPost, useLocksmithProfile, useLocksmithOwner | dashboard → profiles | YES — profiles.adapter.js and kind adapters |
| settings | settings-modern.css, Card.adapter, VportAboutDetails.view.adapter, useVportDirectoryVisibility, useVportBusinessCardSettings, useResolvedVportId | dashboard → settings | YES — settings/adapters/ |
| portfolio | portfolioTraceStore | dashboard → portfolio | VIOLATION — direct import from @/features/portfolio/setup |
| profiles (internal) | getVportServicesController | dashboard → profiles (internal) | VIOLATION — direct import from profiles/kinds/vport/controller/ |

---

## Authorization Pattern

**Tier 1 — UI Gate:** `useVportOwnership` derives `isOwner` flag via `checkVportOwnershipController`. Re-verifies on window focus and visibility change. Explicitly documented as UI convenience only — not the security boundary.

**Tier 2 — Controller Enforcement (security boundary):** All mutating controllers call `assertActorOwnsVportActorController({ requestActorId, targetActorId })` from `@/features/booking/adapters/booking.adapter`. DB-level `actor_owners` check before any write.

**Design Studio exception:** `requireOwnerActorAccess` queries `actor_owners` through its own DAL stack (not booking adapter). Intentional documented deviation.

**Public booking:** `createVportPublicBookingController` verifies user-kind actor; guest/walk-in (null requestActorId) explicitly supported. Service label resolved server-side. VPD-V-019 (customer_actor_id injection prevention) and VPD-V-020 (raw UUID omitted from notification links) both enforced.

---

## Module Independence Classification

**DEPENDENT**

Intentional — dashboard orchestrates across booking, notifications, media, profiles, and settings features via their public adapters. Two adapter boundary violations (portfolio setup, profiles internal) are non-compliant deviations that should be remediated.

---

## Architecture State

**EVOLVING**

Active compliance gaps: Rule 9 violations in 3 card indexes, duplicate model files, 2 adapter boundary violations, pending security passes, DEFER-DASH-001 open, TICKET-BOOKING-RPC-001 DB-blocked. Architecture is structurally sound at controller/ownership level but has card boundary drift that needs SENTRY remediation.

---

## Known Structural Risks

1. **Rule 9 violations — gasprices/index.js, leads/index.js, portfolio/index.js:** Write DALs exported at card boundary. Callers can bypass controller/ownership layer entirely. Priority: P1.
2. **DEFER-DASH-001 — useVportOwnerSchedule.js overloaded:** Manages read + mutation coordination; violates Rule 6. Split into view + action hooks needed. Priority: P1.
3. **Duplicate model files:** buildDashboardCards.model.js and dashboardViewByVportType.model.js exist in both vport/model/ and vport/screens/model/. Dead code risk. Priority: P2.
4. **Adapter boundary violation — useQuickBookingModal.js:** Imports getVportServicesController directly from profiles internal path. Priority: P2.
5. **Adapter boundary violation — useVportPortfolioProbe.js:** Imports portfolioTraceStore from @/features/portfolio/setup. Priority: P2.
6. **TICKET-BOOKING-RPC-001 (DB-BLOCKED):** Broad booking INSERT/UPDATE needs typed state-machine RPCs. customer_actor_id injection + status overpermission on live DB. Deferred until DB migration unblocks. Priority: P1 when unblocked.
7. **Settings VENOM+ELEKTRA post-TICKET-0009 pending:** Settings card full security verification pass not complete. Priority: P1.

---

## Recommended Handoffs

- **SENTRY (P1):** Remediate Rule 9 violations in gasprices/index.js, leads/index.js, portfolio/index.js.
- **VENOM (P1):** Full settings card security pass post TICKET-0009. Flyer builder VENOM reclassification.
- **IRONMAN (P2):** Formal ownership audit for all 10+ cards.
- **SPIDER-MAN (P2):** Test coverage sweep — 10+ cards have zero coverage.
- **CARNAGE (P1 when unblocked):** TICKET-BOOKING-RPC-001 state-machine RPC migration.

---

## Final Module Status

**MOSTLY_COMPLETE**

Well-established architecture with proven ownership enforcement, coordinator pattern (TICKET-0004), and settings coordinator (TICKET-0009). Open items: Rule 9 violations (3 cards), duplicate models, 2 adapter boundary violations, pending security passes. COMPLETE status requires: Rule 9 remediation, DEFER-DASH-001 resolution, and full VENOM+SPIDER-MAN passes.
